text.title: Action Item Carryover Tracker Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Action Item Carryover Tracker end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: create-log
step.action: Create one shared log (Notion DB / Google Sheet / Linear); pin URL.

step.name: define-schema
step.action: Add columns: id / what / owner / source / created_at / due_at / carryover / status.

step.name: import-backlog
step.action: Backfill existing action items; set carryover_count = current-week minus created-week.

step.name: operate
step.action: After every meeting, append items; weekly triage stale set.

step.name: quarterly-pattern-scan
step.action: Scan archived items by reason (killed / done / dropped); name top failure mode.
